<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="YIETFQlO-epwFc96ZZFA" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-684" dy="-193" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1320" pageHeight="720" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#232F3E;" value="DPDP Data Governance: Consent, Authorization, Right to Access and Erasure" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="1000" x="30" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5A6B86;" value="Personal data is limited to Cognito profile, watchlist, connections, and the audit trail, all keyed under USER#{sub}. Market data and insights are non-personal." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="1100" x="30" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="band1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EEF4FF;strokeColor=#9DB8E8;fontColor=#23408E;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=6;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Consent and authentication" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="1280" x="20" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="band2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3EE;strokeColor=#E8B59D;fontColor=#9E4221;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=6;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Right to erasure and right to access" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="390" width="1280" x="20" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#232F3E;" value="User / Next.js UI
(consent screen)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="170" x="40" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cognito" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#DD344C;" value="Cognito User Pool
(MFA, consent attrs)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="190" x="265" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="postconf" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#ED7100;" value="PostConfirmation

consent + version gate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="42" width="185" x="510" y="141" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pretoken" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#ED7100;" value="PreTokenGeneration

Groups: readers / premium / admins" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="235" x="745" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="endpoints" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#8C4FFF;" value="Purpose-limited
data endpoints" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="150" x="1030" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="del_ep" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#8C4FFF;" value="DELETE
/user/my-data" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="150" x="40" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="erasure" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#E7157B;" value="Erasure
